pageDescription: Calculate your lean body mass using various methods with our comprehensive lean body mass calculator

lbmFormula.label: LBM Formula
lbmFormula.boer: Boer: LBM = (0.407 × weight(kg)) + (0.267 × height(cm)) - 19.2 (Men) or (0.252 × weight(kg)) + (0.473 × height(cm)) - 48.3 (Women)
lbmFormula.hume: Hume: LBM = (0.32810 × weight(kg)) + (0.33929 × height(cm)) - 29.5336 (Men) or (0.29569 × weight(kg)) + (0.41813 × height(cm)) - 43.2933 (Women)
lbmFormula.peters: Peters: LBM = (3.8 × (0.01 × height(cm))³ × weight(kg)) / (3.8 × (0.01 × height(cm))³ + 1.8 × (0.01 × weight(kg))³)

boer.title: Boer Method
boer.description: Commonly used in medical dosing and clinical settings

james.title: James Method
james.description: Designed for the general adult population

peters.title: Peters Method
peters.description: Specially designed for children and adolescents

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estimates only and is not a diagnostic tool
criticalWarningsList.individualVariation: Lean body mass varies based on individual factors and measurement accuracy

importantNotesList: Lean body mass includes muscle, bones, organs, and water
Different methods may produce slightly different results
Consult healthcare professionals for accurate body composition analysis
Regular exercise and balanced nutrition support healthy lean body mass

messages.enterMeasurements: Enter your measurements to calculate your lean body mass

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estimates based on mathematical formulas and should not be used as a substitute for professional body composition analysis. Individual results may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Consult a Healthcare Professional
seekHelp.content: For accurate body composition analysis and personalized health advice, please consult with a healthcare professional or certified fitness trainer who can provide guidance based on your complete health history and individual circumstances.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm
errors.bodyFat: Please enter a valid body fat percentage

tooltips.age: Age affects lean body mass calculations
tooltips.method: Different formulas may be more appropriate for different populations
